reason: Offline PPO (8 epochs) on v07d6 episode buffer (481k decisions) with PPO clip + lambda_il=0.5 achieved inference-feature winner_margin=+0.0059, clearly above the v07d5 baseline of -0.0009 (+0.0068 improvement). Confirming that PPO clip prevents the forgetting seen in v07d6 REINFORCE. Stored margin=+0.0388 (diagnostic only). All hard gates pass. Key finding: offline PPO on stale episodes still provides useful learning signal when PPO clip stabilizes updates.
artifact_reuse: v06d18 IL weights (warmstart), v07d6 rl_episodes.pt (episode buffer); v06d18 feature matrix (pipeline rerun)

training_summary.rl_algo: offline PPO (PPO clip=0.2, 8 epochs x 481694 decisions)
training_summary.note: Stored margin oscillated; inference margin positive. PPO clip prevented forgetting seen in v07d6 REINFORCE. IL loss decreased: policy diverged from IL but learned winner-selective signal.

exploration_summary: Offline PPO with PPO clip works where REINFORCE failed. lambda_il=0.5 + PPO clip = learning_promote (+0.0059 inference). Stored margin oscillated across epochs (peak 0.074 at epoch 5, final 0.039). The gap stored=0.039 vs inference=0.006 still shows some dim96 inflation. Next: test lower lambda_il (0.3 or 0.1) to see if more RL signal improves further, or collect fresh online games with updated v07d7 model.
known_risks: Episode data from v07d6 (REINFORCE+forgetting policy) — behavioral policy was not optimal; importance weights may be noisy
Entropy decreasing (1.20→0.75): policy becoming deterministic, may reduce exploration in future online RL
Stored vs inference gap remains large (0.039 vs 0.006): dim96 inflation still present but reduced
Stored margin oscillated: training was unstable across epochs; no convergence to monotone improvement
next_candidates: [aggressive] v07d8: online PPO + lambda_il=0.1, starting from v07d7 model weights; collect fresh games to get better behavioral policy. Tests extreme IL anchor reduction with PPO clip. Primary metric: inference-feature wm.
[conservative] v07d8-alt: online PPO + lambda_il=0.3; moderate reduction from 0.5. Safer anchor test.
[aggressive] v07d8-dim96: remove dim96 from feature vector; retrain IL from scratch on 96-dim features. Eliminates leakage source entirely.
[aggressive] v07d8-more-epochs: collect fresh episodes with v07d7 model, offline PPO 8-16 epochs. Better behavioral policy = better episode distribution.
